title: Clean Redstone - main components
description: Gives a clean look to redstone
body:
If you want to publish a project containing my work, please mention my username "Vunyx" somewhere. Also, a link to my project would be much appreciated.

# Description
This resource pack gives a **clean look** to redstone. It also has **3D redstone dust** with power level indicators.

The only affected blocks are:
- redstone dust
- redstone torches
- repeaters
- comparators

If you want the other redstone components to have the same clean look, you can download my other pack [Clean Redstone - extra components](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clean-redstone-extra-components).

![redstone components arrangement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2946c383460f615e830630bb62803f33202d30df.png)

# How to install
After downloading the resource pack, go to **options -> resource packs** and click the **Open Pack Folder** button, or open `%appdata%\.minecraft\resourcepacks` directly. Put the resource pack in this folder. It should then show up under **Available**. Click the arrow to switch it to the **Selected** tab and click **Done**. That's it, the pack should now be installed properly.
